headline: This release hardens webhook reliability, adds CSV exports and configurable data retention for compliance workflows, and prevents silent data loss from concurrent admin role edits.

themes.user_facing_summary: Webhook delivery is now fully idempotent — retries no longer cause duplicate events, and delivery failures surface directly in the activity log with retry status and last error. Documentation for the idempotency-key contract has been published for webhook subscribers.
supporting_changes: Fix duplicate webhook delivery on retry by respecting idempotency key
Surface webhook delivery failures in the activity log UI
Document the idempotency-key contract for webhook subscribers

themes.user_facing_summary: Billing reports and audit logs can now be exported as CSV, and workspaces can configure custom data retention policies (defaulting to 90 days) to meet SOC 2 and HIPAA requirements. Audit log exports now correctly reflect workspace timezone settings instead of silently using UTC.
supporting_changes: Add CSV export to billing reports
Allow custom retention policies per workspace (default 90 days)
Correct timezone handling in audit log CSV export

themes.user_facing_summary: Concurrent role edits by two admins on the same role are now serialized correctly, preventing silent overwrites where the second save would discard the first without warning.
supporting_changes: Resolve race condition when two admins edit the same role concurrently

notable_changes: Fix duplicate webhook delivery on retry by respecting idempotency key — eliminates double-billed events on transient failures flagged as a SOC 2 audit risk
Surface webhook delivery failures in the activity log UI with retry status and last error — no more scraping server logs to diagnose failures
Add CSV export to billing reports from the workspace settings page
Allow custom retention policies per workspace (default 90 days) to satisfy SOC 2 / HIPAA requirements — fixed retention was a renewal blocker for at least one compliance customer
Correct timezone handling in audit log CSV export — exports previously used UTC regardless of workspace timezone
customer_voice: Enterprise compliance and billing teams asked for safer webhooks (eliminating duplicate event delivery), CSV exports for audit and billing data, and configurable retention to meet SOC 2 and HIPAA requirements — one customer flagged fixed retention as a renewal blocker.
